texto: The failure of national economic policy is costing us more than jobs; it has begun to weaken that uniquely American spirit of risk-taking, large ambition, and optimism about the future. We must rally them now to bold departures that rebuild our national morale as well as our material prosperity.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Mitch Daniels sobre temas ligados a fe. A afirmação “The failure of national economic policy is costing us more than jobs; it has begun to weaken that…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a fe, future, american, útil em momentos de american e ambition.

We must rally them now to bold departures that rebuild our national morale as well as our material prosperity.

texto: If our nation goes over a financial Niagara, we won't have much strength and, eventually, we won't have peace. We are currently borrowing the entire defense budget from foreign investors. Within a few years, we will be spending more on interest payments than on national security. That is not, as our military friends say, a 'robust strategy.'
explicacao: Citação de Mitch Daniels sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “If our nation goes over a financial Niagara, we won't have much strength and, eventually, we won'…” articula amizade, friends, paz em registro de amizade, com relevância para contextos como termino e paz.

texto: The public is increasingly disgusted with a steady diet of defamation, and prepared to reward those who refrain from it.

texto: And before our current legislature adjourns, we intend to become the first state of full and true choice by saying to every low and middle-income Hoosier family, if you think a non-government school is the right one for your child, you're as entitled to that option as any wealthy family; here's a voucher, go sign up.

texto: When business leaders ask me what they can do for Indiana, I always reply: 'Make money. Go make money. That's the first act of corporate citizenship. If you do that, you'll have to hire someone else, and you'll have enough profit to help one of those non-profits we're so proud of.'
